description: Workflow specification — execution flow for a squad.

publish.mcpDescription: Publish a new workflow to an existing squad in Mission Control. Creates workflow steps linked to the squad's agent roster.

archive.mcpDescription: Archive a workflow in Mission Control. Sets the workflow status to archived.

squadSpecId.description: Convex ID of the published squad.

workflowSpecId.description: Convex ID of the workflow to archive.

agentKey.description: Agent key from the squad roster.

reviewSpecId.description: Review spec ID (required for review steps).

onReject.description: Step to return to on rejection (required for review steps).
onReject.validation: must be a valid step.id within the same workflow

dependsOn.description: Step keys this step depends on.
dependsOn.validation: each item must be a valid step.id within the same workflow
